business_hours: Open monday to friday: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM | On saturdays we do: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
emergency_definition: a main sewer line is backed up into the house, or if there's a major pipe burst that requires an immediate water shutoff.
non_emergency_routing_rules: just book them into the next available slot or take a message for the office staff.
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Verify Emergency -> If Emergency: Collect Address/Name/Phone & Escalated Transfer -> If Non-Emergency: Message for Morning
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet -> Identify Caller -> Collect Inquiry -> Attempt Transfer -> Fallback Message
